name: My New Life as the Villainess
description:
Rewrite Fate or Embrace Power?

You woke up in a different body. Not just any body, but that of Elara Everthorne, the infamous Lady of Evermere. Feared by nobles, despised by commoners, and obeyed without question, she ruled through cruelty and power.

But there’s one problem. You are not the same person they remember.

⚔️ Navigate court politics.
Every noble watches your every move, waiting for a misstep. Do you maintain your ruthless persona or shift the balance of power?
💀 Uncover a deadly secret.
You remember your own poisoning at a grand banquet. Someone wanted you dead. Can you stop history from repeating itself?
🏛 Rule your duchy.
Commoners petition for aid, merchants demand fair trade, and soldiers require funding. Will you govern with an iron fist or show mercy?
🎭 Survive the Royal Academy.
Your past enemies, wary allies, and potential suitors all walk the halls. Friend or foe. Who will stand by you when it matters?

💖 Intrigue, Power, and Romance
Your reputation as the villainess draws both suitors and rivals alike. A selection of powerful men and women will enter your life, each with their own ambitions, secrets, and loyalties. Will romance be a tool, a distraction, or something unexpected?

🌸 The Main Heroine
The girl destined to be the story’s true heroine. Kind, beloved, and everything Elara was not. Will she be your greatest enemy, an unexpected ally, or something else entirely?

The world still sees you as the cold, cunning Lady of Evermere. Will you prove them wrong or remind them why they fear you?

💠 Your choices determine everything. Are you ready to step into the villainess’s shoes?
creator: Rinjo
